pi_items.source: Task description, export_result.sh, and verifier logic confirm this exact expected title.
Task description and verifier logic confirm this exact expected tag.
Task description requires Species, Location, Count, Observation Date, Habitat, and Notes (which corresponds to 'text' in TiddlyWiki), matching the synthetic seed data in setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a TiddlyWiki entry form titled 'Bird Sighting Entry Form', which generates entries tagged 'BirdSighting'. The expected form fields are 'species', 'location', 'count', 'observation_date', 'habitat', and 'text' (representing notes), matching the synthetic bird sighting seed data injected by the setup scripts.
